news.t: Wahed and KraneShares Announce the Launch of KWIN: A Shariah-Compliant Alternative Income ETF for Faith-Aligned Investors
KraneShares Launches KWIN: An Alternative Income Index ETF With Wahed Invest LLC

holdings.infoBox: KWIN is an equity ETF with a total of 302 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 19.23%, Advanced Micro Devices at 9.13%, Fortinet at 7.99%, ON Semiconductor at 7.56%, and CrowdStrike Holdings at 6.21%.

overview.description: The KraneShares Wahed Alternative Income Index ETF (KWIN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Wahed Shariah Alternative Income index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US equity securities consistent with Shariah compliance and Islamic principles. The fund employs a call option strategy to generate additional income. KWIN was launched on Nov 5, 2025 and is issued by KraneShares.
